name: BEN_BILL_COMMS
description: This table is used to store the communication details for bill

columns.Name: BILL_PERSON_COMM_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: BILL_PRINTED
columns.Comments: This columns stores  Y or N to say Bill Printed or not.

columns.Name: BILL_SENT
columns.Comments: Thi column stores Y or N to say whether bill sent or not

columns.Name: BILL_SENT_DATE
columns.Comments: This column storeds the date on which the Bill was sent

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F

columns.Name: BILL_RESENT_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the Bill Resent date

columns.Name: BILL_RESENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number of times bill has been resent

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_BILL_CHARGES

columns.Name: BILL_CAL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CALENDAR

columns.Name: BILL_PRINT_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the date on which bill was printed

columns.Name: BILL_SENT_MODE
columns.Comments: Bill Sent Mode. Values could be email/mail/fax etc

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZAION_UNITS
